title: Classic Spawn Eggs
description: A resource pack that brings the classic spawn eggs to 1.21.5+
body:
# Classic Spawn Eggs

This resource pack restores the classic 1.21.4 spawn egg textures, replacing the newer, more decorated designs from 1.21.5. Perfect for players who prefer the old-school look (or just really hate the new eggs)!

### These assets belong to Mojang, I did not create them!
